about.description: Assurant's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Assurant operate in India?
faq.a: Assurant operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India. Two are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Assurant have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Assurant's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Assurant run in India?
faq.a: Assurant runs gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Assurant's India GCCs?
faq.a: Assurant's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Assurant's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 5 leaders at Assurant's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
